name: HWR_MSG_MESSAGE_B
description: The message table stores information about message that needs to be sent to an user in one or more sources.

columns.Name: ID
columns.Comments: This is the primary key for this table. The number should be generated from the sequence.

columns.Name: MESSAGE_TYPE
columns.Comments: This is the type of message that is sent to profiles.

columns.Name: MESSAGE_SUBJECT
columns.Comments: This is the subject line of the message.

columns.Name: MESSAGE_TEXT
columns.Comments: This is the body of the message.

columns.Name: IMAGE_FILE
columns.Comments: This column is used to store the image file

columns.Name: MESSAGE_PROPS
columns.Comments: This is a set of message properties, serialized as XML.

columns.Name: POST_DATE
columns.Comments: This is the date when the message needs to be posted

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
